notes_on_run_location: This is the 8xH JP run (authoritative). The earlier 4xH NE-1 run is at runs/021-recur-alpha-buffer/seed_42/ and was a partial-result step-matched attempt while we waited for JP availability.
interpretation_summary: 021 achieved pre-quant post-EMA 1.06963 (beats 019's 1.07063) thanks to 55 extra training steps. But post-TTT 1.06900 loses to 019's 1.06744 because buffer-α's frozen α gave TTT less headroom to adapt (−0.01013 delta vs 019's −0.01245). Net: 021 does NOT beat #1736 (1.06610) or the existing recur-alpha family. Buffer-α hypothesis confirmed for throughput (0 Type B spikes) but is a mild *regression* on val_bpb endpoint vs literal-α at default loop activation.
